title: taraxacum refectum
intro: Taraxacum refectum, also known as the French dandelion or narrow-leaved dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion genus, characterized by its narrow leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and liver and kidney ailments, due to its high concentration of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as its content of bitter compounds and essential oils. The health benefits of Taraxacum refectum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as used topically in creams and ointments to treat skin conditions.
